data.title: Metropolitan Bank’s Earnings Call Highlights Robust Growth
data.description:
Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. ((MCB)) has held its Q2 earnings call. Read on for the main highlights of the call.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

The recent earnings call of Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. painted a picture of strong financial performance, characterized by significant growth in loans, deposits, and net interest margin. The company also reported robust earnings per share and book value growth, alongside successful share repurchase and dividend announcements. Despite challenges such as increased provision expenses and IT project costs, the overall sentiment was positive, with highlights significantly outweighing the lowlights, indicating a promising outlook.

Loan and Deposit Growth

The company reported a notable increase in outstanding loans by $271 million, or 4.3%, and a rise in core deposits by $342 million, or 5.3%. This growth reflects the bank’s ability to attract and retain customers, contributing to its strong financial standing.

Net Interest Margin Expansion

Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. achieved a net interest margin (NIM) expansion of 15 basis points to 3.83%, marking the seventh consecutive quarter of margin growth. This consistent improvement underscores the bank’s effective interest rate management and operational efficiency.

Earnings Per Share Increase

The bank reported a second-quarter earnings per share of $1.76, representing a 21% increase from the first quarter. This significant rise in earnings per share highlights the company’s strong profitability and operational success.

Book Value Growth

The tangible book value per share increased by more than 4% to $68.44, marking the tenth consecutive quarter of book value accretion. This growth demonstrates the company’s ability to enhance shareholder value consistently.

Successful Share Repurchase Program

Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. completed a $50 million share repurchase program and announced a second $50 million program. These buybacks reflect the company’s confidence in its financial health and commitment to returning value to shareholders.

Dividend Announcement

In a historic move, the bank announced a dividend on common stock, marking the first in its history as a publicly traded company. This decision underscores the company’s strong financial position and its commitment to rewarding shareholders.

Strong Asset Quality

The bank reported excellent asset quality, with no broad-based negative trends identified in any loan segment. This strong asset quality is a testament to the bank’s prudent risk management practices.

Revenue and Net Income Growth

Total revenue grew by 8%, from $70.5 million to $76.2 million, while net income for the second quarter was $18.8 million, up more than 15% versus the prior period. These figures highlight the bank’s robust financial performance and growth trajectory.

Provision Expense Increase

The second quarter saw a provision expense of $6.4 million, reflecting loan growth and adverse movements in forecasted macroeconomic factors. This increase indicates the bank’s proactive approach to managing potential risks.

Reserve for Non-Performing Loan

A $2.4 million reserve was posted for a single non-performing loan, showcasing the bank’s commitment to maintaining a strong balance sheet and addressing potential credit issues.

Non-Interest Income Decline

The second quarter non-interest income decreased by $1 million, primarily due to the absence of a one-time income recognition of $800,000 from the previous period. This decline highlights the impact of non-recurring income on the bank’s financial results.

Increase in IT Project Costs

The bank reported a $1.4 million increase in one-time IT project costs, with further IT costs expected for the remainder of 2025. This rise reflects the bank’s investment in technology to enhance operational efficiency and customer experience.

Forward-Looking Guidance

Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. provided robust guidance for continued growth and stability. The bank expects loan growth of over 12% for the year and anticipates further NIM expansion, projecting an annual NIM of approximately 3.80%. Despite economic uncertainties, the company remains optimistic about further balance sheet growth, supported by strong credit metrics and a diversified deposit funding model.

In summary, the earnings call of Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. highlighted a strong financial performance with significant growth across various metrics. The positive sentiment was driven by impressive loan and deposit growth, net interest margin expansion, and successful shareholder initiatives. Despite some challenges, the overall outlook remains promising, with the company well-positioned for future growth.

  • Ford Stock (NYSE:F) “Stuck in Reverse,” Investors Get Concerned

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

TIMIA Capital ( (TSE:MONT) ) has provided an announcement.

Montfort Capital Corp. has announced the reinstatement of trading for its common shares on the TSX Venture Exchange following the resolution of Failure-to-File Cease Trade Orders by the Ontario Securities Commission. The delay in filing financial statements for 2024 and early 2025 led to temporary trading suspension, but the company has now addressed these issues and is committed to maintaining high compliance standards. Additionally, the company has disclosed related party loans and amendments to its credit facilities, which are subject to TSXV acceptance.

data.title: Sekur Private Data Ltd. Launches CA$2 Million Private Placement to Expand Global Reach
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Sekur Private Data ( (TSE:SKUR) ) has issued an announcement.

Sekur Private Data Ltd. has announced a non-brokered private placement to raise up to CA$2,000,000 through the issuance of units consisting of common shares and share purchase warrants. The funds will be used to market Sekur’s privacy communications solutions in the United States, Europe, and Africa, and for general working capital. The company also completed a previous private placement, raising $105,000. This move is expected to enhance Sekur’s market presence and operational capabilities in the cybersecurity and privacy communications industry.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SKUR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SKUR is a Neutral.

Sekur Private Data’s stock score is driven by its revenue growth and debt-free status, though it is tempered by profitability and cash flow challenges. The technical analysis shows positive momentum, but the negative valuation metrics pose a risk. Recent corporate events like the private placement are positive but are already accounted for in financial performance.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SKUR stock, click here.

More about Sekur Private Data

Sekur Private Data Ltd. is a cybersecurity and Internet privacy provider offering Swiss-hosted solutions for secure and private communications. The company provides encrypted emails, secure messengers, and other secure communication tools, serving consumers and businesses globally through its website, approved distributors, and telecommunications companies.

Average Trading Volume: 131,814

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

The latest update is out from Victory Resources ( (TSE:CRIT) ).

Supreme Critical Metals Inc. has announced a delay in filing its annual audited financial statements and related certifications for the financial year ended February 28, 2025, beyond the deadline of June 27, 2025. The company is actively working to complete these filings and will continue to issue bi-weekly updates until the situation is resolved. Failure to file in a timely manner could result in a cease trade order on the company’s securities by Canadian regulatory authorities.

More about Victory Resources

Supreme Critical Metals Inc. is a publicly traded diversified investment corporation focused on exploring and investigating opportunities in lithium, copper, silver, and precious metals. The company prioritizes regions that are conducive to mining, supported by favorable government regulations and existing infrastructure.

Sekur Private Data ( (TSE:SKUR) ) has shared an update.

Sekur Private Data Ltd. has launched a new Government and Diplomatic Corps division in Washington D.C. in response to increasing cyberattacks on government officials and diplomats. This move positions Sekur to address the growing demand for secure communication solutions, leveraging its proprietary privacy platform hosted in Switzerland. The platform offers encrypted email, messaging, and VPN services, ensuring privacy and security for high-value clients. Sekur’s strategic positioning in the cybersecurity market is bolstered by its adherence to Swiss privacy regulations, and the company anticipates significant growth as global demand for secure communications accelerates.

data.title: Nexcel Metals Corp Secures $110,000 in Private Placement for Québec Exploration
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Nexcel Metals Corp ( (TSE:NEXX) ) has issued an update.

Nexcel Metals Corp has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement financing, raising $110,000 through the issuance of flow-through units priced at $0.50 each. The proceeds will be used for Canadian exploration expenses on the Lac Ducharme Property, qualifying as flow-through critical mineral mining expenditures under Canadian tax law. This strategic financial move is expected to bolster Nexcel’s exploration efforts and strengthen its market position in the mineral exploration sector.

More about Nexcel Metals Corp

Nexcel Metals Corp is a junior mining company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties, with a current focus on the Lac Ducharme Property located in Québec.

data.title: Barnes & Noble Education Delays 10-K Filing
data.description:
Barnes & Noble Education ( (BNED) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Barnes & Noble Education, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ending May 3, 2025. The delay is primarily due to an internal investigation into potential overstatements in the company’s accounts receivable balance, which may have been caused by a payment processing employee. The company is working diligently to complete the investigation and expects to file the report within the 15-day extension period allowed under Rule 12b-25. Despite the investigation, Barnes & Noble Education does not anticipate any significant impact on its total sales or cash and debt positions. The company is also reviewing its internal controls and expects to report at least one material weakness. The notification was signed by Jason Snagusky, the Chief Financial Officer, on July 18, 2025.

Spark’s Take on BNED Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BNED is a Neutral.

Barnes & Noble Education has significant financial challenges, with ongoing losses and high leverage being key concerns. While there are modest signs of improvement in revenue and equity, profitability and cash flow issues remain critical. Technical analysis indicates some market momentum, but valuation metrics highlight fundamental weaknesses. Strategic improvements are essential to enhance the company’s financial health and stock performance.

To see Spark’s full report on BNED stock, click here.

More about Barnes & Noble Education

CENTR Brands Corp. has announced a non-brokered private placement of unsecured convertible debentures totaling $150,000, aiming to use the proceeds for working capital and general corporate purposes. This move is part of CENTR’s strategic response to shifting economic conditions and involves participation from company insiders, highlighting its commitment to enhancing financial flexibility and exploring new business opportunities.

The negative P/E ratio highlights valuation concerns. Overall, the company needs significant financial and operational improvements to enhance stock prospects.

CENTR Brands Corp. is a functional wellness beverage company focused on promoting holistic well-being through high-quality products.
